text:
Dr. Lee (, Ri Hakase) is a doctor from Fānlīn Medical College. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 215 

Appearance

Dr. Lee is a young woman with a scar running down her left eye. A surgical mask mostly covers her face. She wears a standard medical uniform. 

Personality

Dr. Lee is a specialist in her field. She was candid when informing Colt that the Queen's condition was critical and that all they could do was pray. She is also very knowledgeable about the differences between generations of Chimera Ants. Even during the Queen's final moments, she tried to do her best and urged Colt to respect the Queen's wishes. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

After Colt surrenders the Chimera Ants' nest, the Hunter Association summon Dr. Lee to gather a team of her best surgeons and artificial organ specialists to go to the Queen's nest in NGL in order to save her life. Despite their efforts, they can only prolong her from dying for a few minutes. Colt even goes as far as to offer his own organs, but Dr. Lee informs him that his genetic makeup is different from hers and his organs would be insufficient.
